title: Monaco Doesn't Work in F1 2026 🫣
description:

title: BYD to start CHINESE F1 TEAM with Christian Horner?
description:
Could Formula 1 be about to get a Chinese F1 team backed by BYD? There’s growing speculation that there could be a new BYD F1 team, and to add to it, there’s some suspicion that Christian Horner, BYD F1 Team Principal, is a possible reality.

So, is Christian Horner starting an F1 Team and is there going to be a BYD Formula 1 team? Well, right now it’s only rumours and speculation, but a New F1 team and especially a New Chinese F1 team would be a huge moment for the sport. Allow me to break down

title: Lewis Hamilton's big Ferrari F1 breakthrough explained
description:
It'd be tempting after arguably Lewis Hamilton's strongest weekend in Ferrari colours to draw the conclusion that the seven-time F1 champion has made a big breakthrough and is back to his best.

But is this another false dawn or was there firm evidence that Hamilton is really starting to click with Ferrari? And has the balance of power really shifted at Ferrari?

00:00 Is Hamilton back?
02:32 A false dawn?

title: F1® The Movie
description: Sonny Hayes was the most promising phenom in the 1990s in FORMULA 1® until an accident on the track. Thirty years later, his former teammate Ruben Cervantes convinces him to come back and drive alongside hotshot rookie Joshua Pearce for one last chance to be the best in the world. Sonny’s past catches up with him, and he finds that the road to redemption is not something you can travel alone.

description:
